title: Introduction to Python Programming
description: Learn the basics of Python programming, perfect for beginners looking to enter software engineering or data science. Python moolika karunu igenaganna.

title: Artificial Intelligence Fundamentals
description: Understand the basics of AI, machine learning, and neural networks. Kruthima buddhiya ha yanthra iganuma.

title: Sinhala Language and Literature
description: Explore the rich history of Sinhala literature, poetry, and grammar. Sinhala sahithyaya, kavi, ha wiyakarana.

title: Tamil Language and Grammar
description: A comprehensive guide to Tamil language, grammar, and classical literature. Tamil mozhi, ilakkanam, matrum ilakkiyam.

title: Full Stack Web Development
description: Build beautiful websites using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and FastAPI. Web sayit nirmanaya kireema.

title: Business Administration and Management
description: Learn core business principles, management strategies, and entrepreneurship. Viyapara kalamanakaranaya.
